item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
well isn't that nice.. greetings online friends
yes
i'm on team otto
kinda simple, but powerful
seems straightforward enough to me
maybe there’s landslides?
wonder if batman signed it
nope
damnit Craig
unhinged
thought that was mostly a deep-sea dweller
we've all done this
keepin it together
not feeling extremely patriotic this year tbh
hot apologies?
mmm hmm
sorry not sorry
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: 18-month check-in
item.dc:creator: GodBodLoading

item.title: Unhinged meme dump that will surely entertain you ("The 300 000 points special")
item.description:
1. Mmm, salt
2. That's one way to propose, I suppose
3. She dances better with her eyes, than me with my entire body
4. What cigarette break looks like when you're a celebrity
5. Very important tutorial, you will need this in life, trust me!
6. Ladies and gentlemen, they got him
7
8. Cookies
9
10. He shooots and he scores
11. Crowd simulation
12. Starting adult life be like
13
14. Spring time
15. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just, whatever you do, don't press the big red button!

item.description: the key seems to be in (a) keeping your thumb on the stick, and (b) not whacking your self in the face
item.dc:creator: potatoardvarkhybrid

item.title: What a bitch.
item.description:
The president of the extremist Heritage Foundation, Kevin Bitch Roberts, is threatening the country as the leader of Project 2025, which is something out of a dystopian movie. Roberts, who is anti-LGBTQ, has openly stated that he saw Heritage's role as "institutionalizing Trumpism." In his recent ominous comments in a podcast, he says: "we are going to win. We're in the process of taking this country back..let me speak about the radical left. You and I have both been parts of faculties and faculty senates and understand that the left has taken over our institutions." "I come full circle on this response and just want to encourage you with some substance that we are in the process of the second American Revolution, which will remain bloodless if the left allows it to be."
..da fuck is that supposed to mean Kev? Crazy bitch.
For those who don't know what Project 2025 entails - many of you probably already know what it's about - this plan created by activist American conservative think tank the Heritage Foundation, intends to reshape the federal government in their image, in the event that a Republican wins the upcoming election. It literally states: “It is not enough for conservatives to win elections; we need both a governing agenda and the right people in place, ready to carry this agenda out on day one of the next conservative administration." Many contributors have close ties to Donald Trump and his campaign this year. This project seeks to fire all the career civil servants who won't swear absolute loyalty to Trump, and replace a tiny fraction with absolute Trump zealots. Here's just a few of their plans: -Slashing health care insurance -removing legal protections against discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity -To infuse the government with elements of fundamentalist Christianity -Shutting down access to safe abortions, contraception and other reproductive health care, putting women’s lives at risk -Dismantling the foundations of immigration policy, tearing families apart, turning away desperate refugees and stripping away protections for Dreamers -Deleting “sexual orientation and gender identity” from all federal rules, reinstating a transgender military ban and limiting LGBTQ workplace discrimination protections -Promotes capital punishment and the speedy "finality" of those sentences -Gut climate policy and boost fossil fuels could set back global efforts for decades, advocate for oil and gas and ignore greenhouse gas emissions (the think tank says: “to end the focus on the climate crisis and green subsidies”) And that's not all....evil fucking bitches..
item.dc:creator: RepairsGrowTails

item.title: Mēmê Dümp
item.description:
The news depresses me.
I don't really like Ben Affleck as an actor, he's not interesting or engaging to me, but man is he banging meme fodder.
Those who do not study history are doomed to repeat it, and education is culturally undervalued in this country.
Truth, TM
Get it right.
Why mess with a system that works?
Same with VPNs, or at least with mine. All of a sudden it won't work with Disney+ or Prime, then I update it and it works again.
Sneaky.
To avoid this, just run the name past one 13 year old boy.
DUN DUN.
Radiation is a phobia of mine, Chernobyl is terrifying to me, but this made me chuckle.
Kermit has reached his final Kaiju form!
Both.gif
There's always room for family.
I haven't yet given up this hard, but man I get it.
Doing it right.
Reaching across the divide to unite two fandoms. Beautiful.
Jesus needs to buy me dinner first.
That you think you can compete is adorable. Keep striving, champ.
This is right up there with The Fuckening.
I will not be shamed.
He calls you brother unironically.
Blessings upon you, so mote it be.
I'm super, thanks for asking.
It's true.
They need that tank hooked up to a mask.
I'm willing to pay my share, but assholes with more money than I will ever see refuse to pay theirs.
My ability to regulate my body temperature is shot, I am old, and it is currently 106 outside.
Not a great option, but it's an option.
The pills kind of work, so there's that.
They are hard to miss.
Pulling up from a nosedive is hard. Ask for help, no matter how embarrassing or painful it is. People love you.
<3 nom <3
Hehe, or What's New Pussycat 37 times in a row.
Actually this sounds like a painful way to go, so maybe not.
...what if?
As I said earlier, his memeiness seems almost purposeful.
It's me!
Fuck his head and the neck it rode in on.
Direct is good, I want to know what I'm getting into.
It's me, I am the weird aunt.
Fuck corporations. But yeah, I giggled.
Please?
Awwwww.
Release the frög!
I am dating myself here, but I laughed.
OH NO NIPPLES.
This guy is my artistic idol.
It's fucking hot, it's going to be over 100 for the next week and I hate it here.
Yup, goodnight. Maybe I'll post my Daily Sketch For Mental Health tomorrow.
item.dc:creator: DeVleermuis

item.title: anticapitalist dump for the 4th
item.description:
.
.
*if there's factory Work. **if there's Work for artists. ***if Work is required to live.
.
.
.
my first memory = dreaming of a carrot on a stick like this one (from the mule's pov)
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
*iirc, they're referring here to Hoggish Greedly (Captain Planet) & Murky Dismal (Rainbow Brite)...?
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
*brace yourselves for the flagrantly conspiracy-theory-positive portion of the dump*
*which isn't to say corporations aren't also organized criminals
project bluebird -> project artichoke -> mk-ultra
.
.
.
.
read david graeber if you haven't yet. [ theanarchistlibrary.org ]
abdullah ocalan also has some good stuff to say
...

item.dc:creator: MissMortgage

item.title: Yor Forger - SpyxFamily Cosplay
item.description:
The assassin version of Yor Forger from SpyxFamily! This show is still my obsession, as you can tell by my previous posts. Yor is such a fun character and I love how different of a take she is on the whole "femme fatale" assassin character. Def watch this show if you are interested! Also this cosplay was so fun to craft, despite the very tight corset lol
Character reference for y'all in case you have never seen SpyxFamily
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: MissySassy

item.title: Too many wallpapers on my phone dump #5
item.description:
Hey imgur. I'm asking for help, please scroll to the end. Thank you.
Hey imgur. I don't know if I am doing this right but I am in desperate need right now. My family used to consist of me (48f) my son Jason Jr. (17m), my son Johnathan (15m), and my partner Jason Sr. (45m). Both of my sons have autism and other health concerns. 5 years ago my partner fell into a diabetic coma with blood sugars at 650 at the time. He was in a coma for 3 weeks. He did come out of it but he wasn't the same person anymore. He also had severely damaged nerves in his legs and had extreme difficulty walking so was confined to a wheelchair. He had extreme difficulty with all basic functions and caring of himself. I became his primary caregiver along with being the main caregiver of our children. We had no family or friends to help. We were surviving on his disability check, barely, but were getting things taken care of. Unfortunately my partner passed away on May 30th due to complications from pneumonia and a blood infection. This devastated us. My boys were being so brave but were scared. I wasn't able to work and care for everyone at the same time and Jason Sr's needs were such that I had to take only short trips before I was needed again. And the government doesn't help with caregiver duties. But with him gone, we lost our only income. I can't even afford a cremation for Jason Sr. I have no car and haven't for years and now we have to move somehow without money because I can't afford the rent now. But that's not the worst. After a traumatic weekend and frantic ambulance ride from hell to Vanderbilt Children's Hospital in Nashville, I lost my son Jason Jr. Due to a heart infection and ataxia on June 17th. My baby's heart just stopped working. Y'all, this is so hard. My family has been severed by half. This has been so surreal and unreal. And I still don't have the money for another cremation or the money to move me and my remaining child closer to family before we're evicted. So I humbly ask for help. If you can donate or share the gofundme link that my sister set up, that would help. I honestly just need to move closer to what family I have left. Even with no car or anyone to help to actually move. I feel pathetic having to even do this but I have no choice. This is the hardest thing I have ever been through. Jason Jr. was supposed to turn 18 on July 1st. But he didn't. I don't know how to move on with this devastation in my heart. But I have to because my living son Johnathan needs me. And he deserves so much. Sorry if I didn't make any sense. Thank you for reading this. GoFundMe: https://gofund.me/de81d9cf Any help is appreciated.
item.dc:creator: Mistformlady

item.title: Someone told me to get Sammy a cheeseburger for his last meal. So I got him 4.
item.description:
Yes this was his first cheeseburger. Great Danes are prone to bloating and colic, and Sammy especially so. I think his healthy diet is a huge reason he made it to 11.
He loved the first two so much I stopped for two more on the way to the euthanasia appointment. Rest in peace, I’ll always love you. Samwise Underfoot 5/26/2013-6/17/24. Edit: people are asking why I’d put down a “perfectly healthy seeming dog”. I assure you that Sam’s quality of life was extremely poor and this was the worst decision I’ve ever had to make. and I made it with the support of family, friends and professional veterinarians. You can’t tell his health from two 20 second clips of him enjoying his last burgers. I’d appreciate if you are questioning me to just delve into the comments instead of asking. thank you.
item.dc:creator: feryooday

item.title: My job sucks
item.description: I'm poor and hungry. I can get a free lunch if my store gets 10x 5 star google reviews, National Storage Redwood New Zealand. Not a bot, just a hungry boi

item.title: It's meme dump day .... Again.... Vol 110
item.description:
Hello my friends. We are fighting off the existential dread with memes
It's Wednesday, my dudes
.
.
It's out of control. It can't be fixed
.
So fun, loving it
This was an interesting chart
Trying, man.
Pretty much
.
At least I aspire to become one
I hate overhead lights so much
.
Lol
I need the stained glass greenhouse real bad.
Weeeeee
Lol oops this was me screenshotting how insane the history of Chiquita banana company is
Ed Perkins
Ed Perkins
I remember feeling good, I think.
*sigh*
.
Come on
.
My go to is "hanging in there" and I mean by the barest thread
At least one.
This girl makes amazing memes and she's stunning so... Yeah I don't have a crush or anything.
Brilliant
Except the people who don't practice firework safety tomorrow
.
I've given up convincing him of any level of reality. Sure, Dad, climate change is a hoax.
This made me laugh way too hard for someone who has enjoyed more than a few rupi kaurs poems.
Why did this make me laugh till I cried? Sometimes the dumbest memes are the funniest
God, Carey Grant was something else.
.
.
My husband says I'm too nice and don't block people enough. He's probably right.
But also the family disappointment.
Rizz is the only Gen z slang I use for this very reason
Whelp
.
I hate ticks
Girls night
Phew I'm tired, how about y'all?
.
Just leave me here a while to process
Hobbes must remind Fantus who is the boss at least once a day now.
Watch out for alligators
Boop

item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1063 (palm tree simulator)
item.description:
Another morning, another day experiencing the existential horrors. Let's get this bread.
Always.
It's either gonna be this or from my shitposts.
I SAW MY FIRST WANKENPANZER YESTERDAY. It was going up Schnebbly Hill Road, one of the roughest dirt roads in Northern Arizona. I wonder if it made it the full 16 miles of road to Flagstaff.
(I also saw only my second ever Rufous-crowned Sparrow in Sedona yesterday, too, but nobody cares)
Hahahahaha
This recording is indeed sad.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What's goin' on? Beep."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
